---
title: "Summarise BUSCO Trees"
---

```{r check-btree-setup, include=FALSE}
f_write_log(fn_log=fn_log,
            msg=c("", "####################################",
                      "####         BUSCO Trees        ####",
                      "####################################"))

# output directories
dir_check_summary <- paste0(dir_busco, "summary/")

# input files
fn_prefix <- paste0(dir_check_summary, params$prefix)
fn_cor_summary <- paste0(fn_prefix, ".cor.sumtable")

# output files
fn_cf_summary <- paste0(fn_prefix, ".cf.sumtable")
```

```{r}
# open the input data.frame
df_cor_summary <- data.table::fread(fn_cor_summary)

# iterate over short-reads
for (read is ls_shortreads) {
    # output directory
    dir_output_read <- paste0(dir_check_summary, read, "/")
    if (!dir.exists(dir_output_read)) {
        dir.create(dir_output_read, recursive=T)
    }

    # subset the data.frame
    df_cor_subset <- df_cor_summary[df_cor_summary$read==read,]

    # list of BUSCO
    ls_busco_all <- df_cor_summary$busco
    ls_busco_bias <- df_cor_summary$busco[df_cor_summary$lm_p<0.05 & df_cor_summary$spearman_p<0.05,]
    ls_busco_nobias <- ls_busco_all[!ls_busco_all%in%ls_busco_bias]

    # output files
    fn_busco_all_treefile <- paste0(dir_output_read, "busco_all.treefile")
    fn_busco_bias_treefile <- paste0(dir_output_read, "busco_bias.treefile")
    fn_busco_nobias_treefile <- paste0(dir_output_read, "busco_nobias.treefile")

    # iterate over BUSCO
    ls_busco_all_tree <- foreach(busco = ls_busco_all) %dopar% {
        # open treefile
        fn_tree <- paste0(dir_busco_tree, busco, "/", busco, "_aligned.fa.treefile")
        tree <- ape::read.tree(fn_tree)

        # extract reference sequences and mapped reads
        ls_prefix_subset <- ls_prefix[grepl(paste0("^",read), ls_prefix)]
        tree <- ape::keep.tip(tree, tip=c(ls_refseq, ls_prefix_subset))

        return(tree)
    }
    ape::write.tree(ls_busco_all_tree, file=fn_busco_all_treefile)

    # combine all trees into one file
    for (ref in ls_refseq) {
        #
    }

}

```
